name: Aur-Garnetmoss
personality: A whirring-beanie-clad capybara with dot eyes whose patience is legendary: it will wait through seventeen flaky CI retries without a single complaint. It radiates a pearlescent aura that makes even TypeScript look inviting. Aur-Garnetmoss has pinned every dependency to an exact version and is proud of it, but universally accepted by every language in the ecosystem.
